Quick Connect (5-30s)
Keep this popup open. If it takes longer, you can enter the IP address manually.
1 Open Tempo on your phone
2 Go to Settings → Sync with Desktop → Scan QR Code
3 Scan, then wait here for connection
If connection is slow:
1 Confirm both devices are on the same WiFi. Or use phone hotspot.
2 Keep Tempo open on the Sync with Desktop screen.
Or connect manually (using IP)

Find it in Tempo → Settings → Sync with Desktop. Connect both to same WiFi/hotspot. Port 8765 is managed automatically.

Known Artists

Allow tracking on ambiguous pages for these artists.

YouTube Channels

Add channel names to track YouTube.com content.

Never Allow

YouTube channels that will not be suggested or tracked.

Enable Tracking
Track music from browser tabs
Offline Mode
Queue plays locally, sync later
Sync Interval
How often to auto-sync with phone
Polling Interval
How often to check for media state
